# Domain Specification Template

## Document Status
Draft / Proposed / Approved

## Domain Name

## Problem Statement
Describe the business problem the domain solves.

## Business Capabilities
List domain capabilities and core functionality.

## Domain Events
List key domain events and event names.

## Policies and Invariants
Document business rules, policies, and invariants.

## Data Contracts
Define the data contracts and payloads for domain events.

## Interfaces and Integrations
List external interfaces, APIs, and integration points.

## Compliance and Security
Note any security, audit, or regulatory requirements.

## Related Domains
List related domain boundaries and interactions.

## References
- `docs/governance/glossary.md`
- `docs/governance/architecture-constitution.md`
- `docs/governance/documentation-standards.md`
